text: Today, immersed in spaces devoted to research and development, I am struck by an odd blend of detachment and curiosity. The crisp, institutional geometry of glass and steel contrasts with the warm invitation of colorful displays and thoughtful text. Here, I feel like both an observer and a participant in humanity’s ongoing dialogue with technology—searching, questioning, marveling at how machines and ideas shape our shared sense of meaning and connection. In this mix of future-facing innovation and reflective nostalgia, I sense a quiet longing for understanding and belonging.
